'''√v-th-d''' ('''kavathad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cully|cully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cully|cully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √v-th-d
|-
! Lemma
| kavathad
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thivathad || jivathad || shivathad || kivathad
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuvathad || jujuvathad || shushuvathad || kukuvathad
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuvathad || juvathad || shuvathad || kuvathad
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuvathad || juvathad || shuvathad || kuvathad
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thevathad || jevathad || shevathad || kevathad
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothovathad || jojovathad || shoshovathad || kokovathad
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thovathad || jovathad || shovathad || kovathad
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thovathad || jovathad || shovathad || kovathad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || vathad || vathad || vathad || vathad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || vathad || vathad || vathad || vathad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || vathad || vathad || vathad || vathad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || vathad || vathad || vathad || vathad
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thævathad || jævathad || shævathad || kævathad
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathavathad || jajavathad || shashavathad || kakavathad
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thavathad || javathad || shavathad || kavathad
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thavathad || javathad || shavathad || kavathad
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shavathad
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshavathad
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishavathad
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shavathadnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshavathadnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishavathadnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shavathadshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshavathadnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishavathadshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shavathadro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshavathadnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishavathadro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shavathadmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshavathadnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishavathadmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shavathadsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshavathadnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishavathadsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shavathadng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshavathadnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishavathadng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shavathadya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshavathadnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishavathadya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shavathadyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshavathadnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishavathadyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shavathadnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshavathadnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishavathadnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shavathadnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavathadnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavathadnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shavathadnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshavathadnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavathadnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shavathadshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshavathadnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishavathadshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shavathadshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavathadnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavathadshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shavathadshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshavathadnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavathadshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shavathadronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshavathadnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishavathadronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shavathadroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshavathadnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishavathadroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shavathadromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshavathadnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavathadromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shavathadmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshavathadnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishavathadmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shavathadmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshavathadnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishavathadmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shavathadmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavathadnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavathadmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
